entry.title: sometimes i'm good if it's not all day and i have meds but when i lived alone or i'm just bored which is a lot, it's horrible 😭 WHATS EVERYONE DOING TO HELP WITH THIS??? #adhd #auadhd #neurodivergent
entry.content: sometimes i'm good if it's not all day and i have meds but when i lived alone or i'm just bored which is a lot, it's horrible 😭 WHATS EVERYONE DOING TO HELP WITH THIS??? #adhd #auadhd #neurodivergent
